/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FaceLandmarkVid.dir/FaceLandmarkVid.cpp.o -o ../../bin/FaceLandmarkVid  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../../lib/local/LandmarkDetector/libLandmarkDetector.a ../../lib/local/FaceAnalyser/libFaceAnalyser.a ../../lib/local/GazeAnalyser/libGazeAnalyser.a ../../lib/local/Utilities/libUtilities.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openblas/0.3.31/lib/libopenblasp-r0.3.31.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_objdetect.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libdlib.20.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openblas/lib/libopenblas.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/boost@1.85/lib/libboost_filesystem-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/boost@1.85/lib/libboost_system-mt.dylib
